name: Adding Payments to a Sale
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can process diverse payment methods efficiently through adding payments to sales in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " POS, which supports cash, card, account, and alternative payment methods for flexible transaction completion. This payment flexibility helps retail operators accommodate customer payment preferences and streamline checkout, with effective multi-payment handling typically improving customer satisfaction and reducing transaction friction across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Payment processing in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to accept multiple payment methods within single transactions, split payments across methods, and handle complex payment scenarios seamlessly. This payment capability helps ensure your retail operations can accommodate various customer payment preferences while maintaining accurate financial tracking and efficient checkout workflows."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Payments are added to sales via the Payment tab, and can be either a partial payment or a full payment. To add a payment:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Payment ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pptsTEAQ.jpg", "embedData": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Minimum-Deposit", "children": [{"text": "Minimum Deposit"}]}, {"text": " required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The right-hand side of the screen will display any previous payments, as well as the totals"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": {"text": "Cash", "bold": true}, {"text": " icons to quickly enter a cash payment (click the image multiple times to increase the amount)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", the arrow next to the icon to select the full amount, or type the amount into the field and click "}, {"text": "Pay", "bold": true}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If using an integrated payment method, clicking Pay will trigger the integration to the terminal"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppttqEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppttqEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid4.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To delete the payment before the sale is processed click the "}, {"text": "Trash Can ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Once the sale has been processed the payment can only be "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Removing-payments-from-a-sale", "children": [{"text": "reversed"}]}, {"text": " (not deleted)"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
